props.noGutters: Removes the gutter gap between columns.
props.gap: Gutter override — a single value for both axes, or `[x, y]`. Accepts px numbers or any CSS length.
props.columns: Total columns the row is divided into. Defaults to 12.
props.density: Gutter size preset — default (24px), comfortable (16px), or compact (8px).
props.align: Vertical alignment of columns (align-items): start, end, center, baseline, stretch.
props.alignSm: align from the sm breakpoint up.
props.alignMd: align from the md breakpoint up.
props.alignLg: align from the lg breakpoint up.
props.alignXl: align from the xl breakpoint up.
props.alignXxl: align from the xxl breakpoint up.
props.justify: Horizontal distribution of columns (justify-content): start, end, center, space-between, space-around, space-evenly.
props.justifySm: justify from the sm breakpoint up.
props.justifyMd: justify from the md breakpoint up.
props.justifyLg: justify from the lg breakpoint up.
props.justifyXl: justify from the xl breakpoint up.
props.justifyXxl: justify from the xxl breakpoint up.
props.alignContent: Alignment of wrapped rows (align-content): start, end, center, space-between, space-around, space-evenly, stretch.
props.tag: The element the row renders as.
